title: How Texas Restaurants Are Cutting Labor Costs 40% With Delivery Robots
excerpt: Dallas and Houston restaurants are deploying KEENON T9 robots to handle the dinner rush. Here's what the ROI looks like after 90 days — and why the math works even for small operators.
content:
The Labor Crisis Hitting Texas Restaurants Hard

Texas restaurant operators are facing a perfect storm: minimum wage pressures, a persistently tight labor market, and post-pandemic diners who expect faster, more consistent service. In Dallas alone, the restaurant industry reported a 28% average annual turnover rate in 2025 — each hire costing an estimated $1,500–$3,000 to recruit and train.

That's where service robots are changing the equation.

What the T9 Delivery Robot Actually Does

The KEENON T9 is not a novelty — it's a workhorse. In a typical restaurant setting, the T9:

  • Delivers food from kitchen to table autonomously, following LIDAR-mapped routes
  • Handles up to 30kg of payload across 4 trays per trip
  • Operates silently on a 24-hour battery cycle
  • Reduces server walking distance by 60–70% during peak hours

The result? Your existing staff focuses on guest interaction and upselling — the high-value work — while the robot handles the repetitive logistics.

Real ROI: The 90-Day Math

TXROBO clients across Dallas, Houston, Austin, and San Antonio consistently report:

  • $300–$500 in weekly labor savings per robot deployed
  • Payback period of 60–90 days on a standard rental plan
  • 15–20% improvement in table turnover rate during peak hours
  • Measurable reduction in order errors (the robot doesn't misread handwriting)

Oklahoma and Louisiana Restaurants Are Following

The trend is expanding beyond Texas. Restaurant groups in Oklahoma City, Tulsa, New Orleans, and Baton Rouge are now evaluating KEENON robots after seeing Texas results. TXROBO's regional service teams cover all these markets with same-day support.

Getting Started: The 6-Day Free Trial

TXROBO offers a 6-day free trial — zero cost, zero commitment. We deliver the robot to your location, map your floor plan, and train your staff in a single session. Most operators see measurable impact within the first 48 hours.

To schedule your free trial, call 214-454-9356 or email info@txrobo.com. We serve Dallas, Houston, Austin, San Antonio, Oklahoma City, Tulsa, New Orleans, Baton Rouge, Albuquerque, Little Rock, and surrounding areas.
author: TXROBO Team

seo.meta_description: Texas restaurants cut labor costs 40% with KEENON T9 delivery robots. 6-day free trial in Dallas, Houston, Austin. See the 90-day ROI breakdown.

title: KEENON T10 Wins 2025 iF Design Award: Why This Changes Service Robotics
excerpt: The KEENON T10 is the first service robot to win the prestigious iF Design Award. Beyond aesthetics, its engineering — 40kg payload, 23.8" ad screen — is redefining what a delivery robot can be.
content:
A Robot That Earns While It Delivers

When the 2025 iF Design Award committee selected the KEENON T10 as a winner, it wasn't for the robot's looks alone. The award recognized a fundamental insight: that a delivery robot should be a revenue-generating asset, not just a cost-reduction tool.

The T10's 23.8" HD advertising display turns every delivery run into a marketing opportunity. Hotels show room upgrade promotions. Restaurants push daily specials. Corporate offices display internal announcements. The display pays for itself.

Technical Specifications That Matter

  • Payload: 40kg across 4 trays — the heaviest in its class
  • Display: 23.8" HD screen, manageable via a web dashboard
  • Battery: 24-hour continuous operation
  • Navigation: LIDAR + depth camera hybrid for obstacle avoidance
  • Connectivity: Works on standard WiFi — no infrastructure changes

Where the T10 Excels in the Southwest

For hotels and resorts across Texas, Oklahoma, and Louisiana, the T10 solves a specific problem: room service labor during overnight hours. A single T10 can handle 15–20 room deliveries per shift without overtime costs, while displaying upsell promotions on its screen during each run.

Available Now in Texas and Surrounding States

TXROBO deploys the T10 across Dallas, Houston, Austin, San Antonio, Oklahoma City, Tulsa, New Orleans, Baton Rouge, Albuquerque, and Little Rock. 6-day free trial available — call 214-454-9356.
author: TXROBO Team

seo.meta_description: KEENON T10 wins 2025 iF Design Award. 40kg payload + 23.8" ad screen delivery robot now available in Texas, Oklahoma, Louisiana via TXROBO. 6-day free trial.

title: TXROBO Now Serves Oklahoma & Louisiana — What That Means for Your Business
excerpt: Businesses in Oklahoma City, Tulsa, New Orleans, and Baton Rouge can now access 6-day free trials with local TXROBO support teams on the ground. Here's what the regional expansion means.
content:
Why Oklahoma and Louisiana?

Texas was our proving ground. After deploying KEENON robots across Dallas, Houston, Austin, and San Antonio, the pattern was clear: the businesses that benefit most aren't necessarily in major metros. They're in markets where labor is tight, margins are thin, and automation adoption is still low — giving early adopters a real competitive edge.

Oklahoma City, Tulsa, New Orleans, and Baton Rouge fit that profile precisely.

What's Available in These Markets

TXROBO's full robot lineup is now deployable in Oklahoma and Louisiana:

  • T10 — 40kg delivery + 23.8" ad screen (restaurants, hotels, corporate)
  • T9 — 30kg flagship delivery robot (multi-industry)
  • S100 — Autonomous UV + spray disinfection (hospitals, hotels)

Same-day on-site support, same monthly rental structure, same 6-day free trial.

Healthcare in New Orleans: The S100 Opportunity

New Orleans' large medical center footprint makes it particularly suited for the S100 disinfection robot. With UV + spray dual-mode capability and autonomous navigation, the S100 covers hospital floors, waiting rooms, and corridors on a scheduled or on-demand basis — reducing the workload on environmental services staff.

Start With a Free Trial

Whether you're in Oklahoma City, Tulsa, New Orleans, Baton Rouge, or anywhere in our expanded service area, the entry point is the same: a 6-day free trial at no cost. Call 214-454-9356 or email info@txrobo.com to schedule deployment.
author: TXROBO Team

seo.meta_description: TXROBO now serves Oklahoma City, Tulsa, New Orleans, and Baton Rouge with KEENON service robots. 6-day free trial. T9, T10, S100 delivery and disinfection robots.
